params.TgtPrompt: Select target permanent card in your graveyard
params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target permanent card in your graveyard until end of turn. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target permanent card in your graveyard
remaining_params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target permanent card in your graveyard until end of turn. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.

params.Description: CARDNAME enters tapped unless you control a Forest.
